content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'LOOK FORWARD TO'. CanDo: Can use 'look forward to' as a fixed expression followed by an '-ing' form or noun phrase, usually at the end of correspondence.
chinese_human_name: 固定表达：look forward to 的用法
examples: I'm looking forward to seeing you!、I look forward to hearing from you.、I am looking forward to our meeting.
trigger_lemmas: look forward to、looking forward to、forward to
keywords: 固定表达,look forward to,动名词,介词 to,书信用语

content: Guideword: FORM: REPORTING VERBS + DIRECT OBJECT 'THAT'-CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use a limited range of verbs, typically reporting, with a 'that'-clause as the direct object.
chinese_human_name: 报告动词+that从句作宾语：基础表达结构
examples: I hope that you'll come.、I think that it begins on 20 or 21 May.、My mother said that she can help us.、I heard that you are quite busy right now.
keywords: 报告动词,that从句,直接宾语,句型结构,省略that

content: Guideword: FORM: VERBS + INDIRECT OBJECT CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use verbs, typically reporting verbs, followed by a noun or pronoun as the indirect object and a clause with or without 'that', as the direct object.
chinese_human_name: 动词+间接宾语从句：报告动词的间接引语结构
examples: I told you that she has a new car?、You promised me that you will help me to paint my bedroom.、Nisha told me you had an accident last week.
keywords: 报告动词,间接宾语,宾语从句,that省略,时态一致

content: Guideword: FORM: VERBS + DIRECT OBJECT CLAUSE WITHOUT 'THAT'. CanDo: Can use reporting verbs, especially mental process verbs, with a clause as the direct object, without 'that', especially in informal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 动词+宾语从句（省略that）：非正式语境中的报告动词用法
examples: I hope you can go, buddy.、I think I left my phone there, maybe in your kitchen.、I think you should go visit the Kuala Lumpur Twin Towers.、I know it's impossible for you to come during examination time.、My mother said you can come to me at 6.30 pm.
keywords: 宾语从句,报告动词,心理过程动词,非正式语境,that省略

content: Guideword: FORM: NO OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a limited range of phrasal verbs without an object.

examples: I'm going to get up early on Saturday.、Shall we go out this weekend to a concert?、We can meet up at 2 pm.、If you have time, you can come over and I will introduce you to my friends.、Every day I can see the sea when I wake up.

keywords: 短语动词,无宾语,小品词,固定搭配,日常动作

I am really excited about the idea.、Do you like shopping?、Did you buy a new mobile phone?、I thought that I wouldn't find nice clothes for me, but surprisingly, I did.、Why didn't you come to my birthday party?

content: Guideword: FORM: VERBS + 'TO'-INFINITIVE OR + '-ING'. CanDo: Can use verbs expressing preference followed either by a 'to'-infinitive or an '-ing' form, with no change in meaning.

examples: I love to play football.、I love to cook.、I prefer to play football but I often go to the gym.、I hate to watch any sports.、I love cooking and also baking.、I love listening to music, especially hip-hop music.、I hate wearing trousers in summer.

chinese_human_name: 否定句中作为宾语的'any'：指代复数或不可数名词
examples: Bring some good CDs. I don't have any.、Can you bring orange juice please? I don't have any. (Portugal; A2 WAYSTAGE; 2009; Portuguese; Pass、[talking about taking presents to a party] Did you take any?
keywords: any,否定句,宾语,复数名词,不可数名词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'ONE'. CanDo: Can use 'one' as a pronoun to substitute for singular countable nouns which have already been mentioned or are obvious from the context.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替代：用'one'替代单数可数名词
examples: [talking about a phone] I chose the black one with the numbers in orange.、I bought a new pullover, because my old one is too small.
keywords: 代词替代,单数可数名词,限定词,形容词,语境推断

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: POSTMODIFYING, SPECIFYING. CanDo: Can use 'the one' and 'the' + pre-modifier + 'one' with a complement, to refer to something specific.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替代：使用'the one'和'the + 修饰语 + one'指代特定事物
examples: My house is No.8 and it's the one with silver gates.、All my friends gave me a present but the one I liked best was John's.、Do you remember the one that we saw last week?、I bought a jacket because the other one that I had was too small, and a t-shirt to use in the summer.、My house is the first one on the left.
trigger_lemmas: the one、the first one、the other one、the one with
keywords: 代词替代,the one,后置修饰,特定指代,避免重复

content: Guideword: FORM: PRE-MODIFYING. CanDo: Can use determiners + premodifers + 'one'.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替代：限定词+修饰语+one/ones的用法
examples: I like my present very much because I needed a new one.、I love blue so I bought the blue one.、It is easy to use and it is smaller than the old one.、It's better than the other one.、I have lots of presents, but my favourite one is a CD, Michael gave it to me.
trigger_lemmas: a new one、the blue one、the old one、my favourite one
keywords: 代词替代,one,ones,限定词,修饰语

content: Guideword: FORM: OBJECT OR COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of indefinite pronouns as objects or complements of prepositions.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词作宾语或介词补语：someone, everyone, somebody等
examples: [talking about a phone] I need it because I have to call someone.、I invited everyone in the school but some people didn't come …、I have borrowed it from somebody.
trigger_lemmas: call someone、invite everyone、borrow from somebody、tell someone
keywords: 不定代词,宾语,介词补语,someone,everyone,somebody,动词搭配,介词搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use a limited range of indefinite pronouns ('someone', 'everyone') as subjects, with a singular verb.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词作主语：someone, everyone等与单数动词的搭配
examples: I bought them because someone stole my luggage at the airport.、When someone calls me, it rings with a very lovely song.、I liked the competition because it is an enjoyable game and everyone likes it.
keywords: 不定代词,主语,单数动词,someone,everyone

content: Guideword: USE: 'SOMETHING' IN VAGUE EXPRESSIONS. CanDo: Can use 'something' in vague expressions, to refer to things in a non-specific way.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词something：在模糊表达中泛指事物
examples: After the concert we can have a pizza or something else.、You do not have to bring any food, but I will pleased if you could bring something to drink -  wine, coke or something.、You can bring a cake or something like that.
trigger_lemmas: or something、something else、something like that、bring something
keywords: 不定代词,模糊表达,非特异性,or something,something else

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH ADJECTIVE, SPECIFYING. CanDo: Can modify 'something' or 'anything' with an adjective, to make it more specific.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词something/anything与形容词的搭配：使表达更具体
examples: Next weekend it's my mum's birthday party, so I needed something new to wear.、You need to wear something comfortable.、But I didn't find anything wrong .、You don't have to bring anything special.
keywords: 不定代词,形容词修饰,something,anything,具体化表达

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE + 'ANYTHING'. CanDo: Can use 'anything' after a negative verb form.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 否定句中的'anything'用法：表示'任何东西'
examples: You don't have to bring anything.、When I want to eat something in the night, I can't find anything because it is too dark.
keywords: anything,否定句,宾语,something,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'ELSE'. CanDo: Can use indefinite pronouns with 'else'.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词与else的搭配用法：something else, someone else等
examples: Have you got something else to do on Saturday or can you come with me?、We have to bring some paints, but nothing else.、If you need anything else, you'll find it in the classroom.、I'm going to a rock concert on Saturday, but I have three tickets for two people (me and my brother) and I am looking for someone else to go with me, so, would you like to go?
keywords: 不定代词,else,something else,someone else,anything else

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'TO' INFINITIVE, SPECIFYING. CanDo: Can modify 'something' or 'anything' with 'to' infinitive, to make it more specific.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词后接to不定式：something/anything + to do
examples: Please, bring something to drink.、Bring some sweets and something to wear if you get cold.、I had to buy them because I didn't have anything to wear on my holidays.
keywords: 不定代词,to不定式,something,anything,具体化表达

content: Guideword: USE: 'YOU', GENERAL. CanDo: Can use 'you' to refer to people in general.
chinese_human_name: 代词'you'的泛指用法：指代一般人或泛指人群
examples: My new mobile phone can do lots of things! You can play games, you can take pictures.、Let's say if you want to travel to China, you need to learn a little Chinese.
trigger_lemmas: if you want to、you can、you need to、let's say you
keywords: 代词you,泛指用法,一般现在时,普遍情况,一般建议

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时的否定形式：am/is/are not + V-ing
examples: [talking about a computer] I’m not using it any more.、…the fridge isn't working.、… he's going to work at 5.00 am, so he's not eating anything ...
keywords: 现在进行时,否定形式,am/is/are not,动词-ing,当前动作

content: Guideword: USE: EVENTS IN PROGRESS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with an increasing range of verbs to talk about situations and events in progress.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时：描述正在进行的动作和事件
examples: I am watching a swimming competition.、I'm selling an English book. It's called "English II".、It's June and it's getting warmer.
keywords: 现在进行时,动词-ing,正在进行,动态事件,时间状语

content: Guideword: USE: TEMPORARY SITUATIONS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a limited range of verbs to talk about temporary situations.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时：描述临时性状况
examples: [talking about a temporary situation] I'm living with my friend in Wolverhampton. I'm studying at Wolverhampton College.、My mother is working today so my older brother can bring us to the sports centre.
keywords: 现在进行时,临时性状况,动词-ing形式,时间状语,短期安排

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'wh-' questions, especially in the context of letters and emails.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时疑问句：wh-疑问词在书信邮件中的应用
examples: Dear Mom, How are you doing?、What are you bringing with you?
trigger_lemmas: how are you、what are you、where are you、why are you
keywords: 现在进行时,wh-疑问词,动词-ing形式,书信邮件,疑问句型

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH ADVERBS OF INDEFINITE FREQUENCY. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a limited range of adverbs of indefinite frequency, often to talk about surprising or undesirable situations or events (especially with 'always').
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时与不定频率副词搭配：表达惊讶或不满
examples: I'm always dreaming about a job as a secretary.、You are always losing things.、She is always smiling.
keywords: 现在进行时,不定频率副词,always,情感表达,动词-ing形式

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with an increasing range of regular and irregular verbs.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时肯定句：规则与不规则动词的肯定形式
examples: They are very important to me, because they bring me good luck.、I hope you can come next time.、The journey takes about half an hour from Paris.
keywords: 一般现在时,肯定句,第三人称单数,规则动词,不规则动词,动词变化,习惯描述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: REAL AND IMAGINED SITUATIONS AFTER 'IF'. CanDo: Can use the present simple after 'if' to talk about real and imagined situations.
chinese_human_name: 条件句中的一般现在时：if引导的真实与想象情况
examples: If you want some help, I will be free next week.、If you go with your parents, you will go walking or swimming, but if you go with friends, you will have more fun.、Don't forget to wear colourful clothes because if you wear white clothes, you will get paint on them.、[talking about a toothbrush] It is very important for me because if I don't have it, I can't clean my teeth.
trigger_lemmas: if you want、if you go、if i have、because if
keywords: if,一般现在时,条件句,真实情况,想象情况,will

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS OF INDEFINITE FREQUENCY. CanDo: Can use the present simple with adverbs of indefinite frequency.    ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时与不定频率副词搭配使用
examples: People usually try to eat their breakfast between 7 and 9 am.、They always make special things for their celebrations.
keywords: 一般现在时,不定频率副词,习惯性动作,词序规则,频率表达

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'yes/no' and 'wh-' question forms with 'you'.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时疑问句：与'you'搭配的yes/no和wh-问句
examples: Do you have a mobile phone?、Do you know we are going to have a concert at school?、What do you think about my mobile phone?、Who do you want to come to the concert?
trigger_lemmas: do you have、do you know、what do you think、who do you want
keywords: 一般现在时,疑问句,you,do,动词原形,wh-疑问词,yes/no问句

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form with an increasing range of regular and irregular verbs.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时否定形式：don't/doesn't + 动词原形
examples: I don't need the video because I've got the DVD.、You don't bring anything because it's the first day.、It doesn't cost very much.
keywords: 一般现在时,否定形式,don't,doesn't,动词原形,第三人称单数,习惯性动作

content: Guideword: USE: MENTAL PROCESS VERBS. CanDo: Can use the present simple with a limited range of mental process verbs including 'think', 'hope', 'know'.
chinese_human_name: 现在简单时态：心理过程动词think/hope/know的用法
examples: I think my bag is in your kitchen.、I hope that you feel better.、Do you know  that I am going to a concert on Saturday.
keywords: 现在简单时态,心理过程动词,think,hope,know,状态动词,that从句

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the present simple with 'why don't you…?', 'Why don’t we…?' and 'if you want or if you like' to make suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时用于建议：Why don't you/we...? 和 if you want/like
examples: Why don't you wear your black suit?、Why don’t we go to a disco when the film ends?、We could have dinner after that if you want.、We can go there, if you like.
trigger_lemmas: why don't you、why don't we、if you want、if you like
keywords: 一般现在时,建议表达,Why don't you,Why don't we,if you want,if you like

content: Guideword: USE: INSTRUCTIONS AND DIRECTIONS. CanDo: Can use the present simple to give instructions and directions.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时：用于指示和方向
examples: Then you turn right and my house is on your left.、To find my house you have to leave the bus at the station "Unberhof" Then you go straight on for about fifty meters.、Then you walk for a few minutes See you tomorrow.
trigger_lemmas: turn right、go straight on、walk for、leave at
keywords: 一般现在时,指示,方向,动词原形,省略主语

content: Guideword: FORM: INDIRECT QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can form indirect questions with 'Do you know' + 'how', 'where', 'why', or 'what …?'
chinese_human_name: 间接疑问句：Do you know + 疑问词引导的从句
examples: Do you know how to get to my house?、Do you know which present I like best?
keywords: 间接疑问句,Do you know,疑问词,陈述句语序,礼貌询问

content: Guideword: FORM: 'JUST' + PREPOSITION. CanDo: Can use 'just' to modify prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 副词'just'修饰介词短语：表示精确位置或强调
examples: It's just near the cinema.、So you have to go along 3 blocks and turn on your left and just in front of you is the Cathedral and next to the Cathedral is the Zocalo.、My house is just after the library.
trigger_lemmas: just near、just after、just in front of、just before
keywords: just,介词短语,精确位置,强调,地点描述

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX. CanDo: Can use a limited range of complex prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 复杂介词短语：near to、such as、in front of等固定搭配
examples: We can meet in the park near to my house at 7.00 p.m.、I have a lot of hobbies, such as reading, singing, drawing and so on.、I will be free at 4 p.m. and we can meet each other in front of our tennis club.
keywords: 复杂介词,固定搭配,位置介词,举例介词,near to,such as,in front of

content: Guideword: FORM: SIMPLE. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of simple (single-word) prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 基础介词：by, like, between, before, opposite 的简单用法
examples: Please return it by tomorrow morning.、My phone is blue like the sky.、The match was between Arsenal and Liverpool.、We have to arrive home before 7.30pm.、My house is opposite the post office.、During the party I danced, played games, ate cake and talked to everyone.
trigger_lemmas: by tomorrow、like the sky、between and、before 7.30pm、opposite the post office
keywords: 介词,by,like,between,before,opposite,时间关系,地点关系,相似性

content: Guideword: FORM: + '-ING'. CanDo: Can form prepositional phrases using the '-ing' form of verbs as complements.
chinese_human_name: 介词后接动词-ing形式作宾语：by doing, for doing, about doing等
examples: I can help by bringing the sound box and bit box I am free at friday 7:30 pm.、Thanks for replying.、I was crazy about playing tennis.
keywords: 介词,动词-ing形式,动名词,介词短语,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: STRANDING. CanDo: Can end a 'wh-' question with a preposition, where the preposition is stranded from its complement.
chinese_human_name: 介词悬置：以介词结尾的wh-疑问句
examples: Who are you going with?、So what are you waiting for?
keywords: 介词悬置,wh-疑问句,句末介词,非正式语法,补语分离

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时：肯定形式
examples: I was waiting for you all Saturday evening.、[talking about a holiday] I was swimming and sunbathing every day.、We were dancing all evening.
keywords: 过去进行时,was/were,动词-ing,时间状语,正在进行

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous with a limited range of adverbs in the normal mid position.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时与副词搭配：中间位置副词用法
examples: I was just watching a football match.、[talking about wanting to get a kitten] I was always dreaming about it.
keywords: 过去进行时,副词中间位置,just,always,still

content: Guideword: USE: BACKGROUND EVENTS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous to show that an event was happening in the background to the main event.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时：描述背景事件
examples: Yesterday we were studying maths in your house, and I left my book on your bed.、It was raining when I arrived.
keywords: 过去进行时,背景事件,was/were,动词-ing,when/while

content: Guideword: USE: EVENTS IN PROGRESS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous to talk about actions and states in progress around a particular time in the past.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时：描述过去特定时间正在进行的动作或状态
examples: I went to a soccer game, they were playing the last game to get the championship.、It was raining, but the concert was so good that I did not mind.
keywords: 过去进行时,was/were,动词-ing,进行中动作,过去背景描述

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with an increasing range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时肯定式：规则与不规则动词的肯定用法
examples: I forgot to tell you some details about tomorrow evening.、I spent about £35 on all those clothes.、[talking about a football game] I liked it very much because my favourite team won, it was great.
keywords: 一般过去时,肯定式,动词过去式,不规则动词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'yes/no' and 'wh-' question forms with 'you' with a limited range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 过去时一般疑问句：'Did you...' 和 'Wh- did you...' 句型
examples: Did you buy something yesterday?、[talking about a lost phone] Did you find it?、And when did you go shopping last?
trigger_lemmas: did you、when did you、what did you、where did you
keywords: 过去时,一般疑问句,Did you,Wh-疑问句,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form with a limited range of regular and irregular verbs.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时否定形式：did not/didn't + 动词原形
examples: The player from China did not look very happy though.、You did not keep your promise.、I didn't tell you that my house is opposite the new cinema.、They didn't cost much ...、I was surprised because the heating didn't work.
trigger_lemmas: did not、didn't、look happy、keep promise、tell you、cost much、work well
keywords: 一般过去时,否定形式,did not,didn't,动词原形,不规则动词

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'WHEN'. CanDo: Can use 'when' + past simple in subordinate clauses.
chinese_human_name: 过去时从句：when引导的时间状语从句
examples: When I arrived, the weather was horrible.、[talking about a missing phone] I think I left it in the kitchen when I fell on the slippery floor.
trigger_lemmas: when i arrived、when she called、when it happened、when we met
keywords: when,过去简单时态,时间状语从句,过去事件,动词过去式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'YET'. CanDo: Can use the negative form with 'yet' to talk about events which are expected to be completed at some point in the future.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时否定式与yet搭配：表达尚未完成但预期会完成的事件
examples: [talking about a new mobile phone] I haven't seen it yet .、[talking about a book] It's very important because I haven't finished it yet.、I haven't seen this film yet.
keywords: 现在完成时,否定式,yet,预期完成,未完成事件

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: TIME WITH 'FOR'. CanDo: Can use the negative form with 'for' to talk about a past event or action which hasn't occurred again in the period of time up to now.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时否定式与for连用：表示过去事件至今未再发生
examples: I haven't eaten Italian food for a long time.、I'm sorry I haven't written for so long.、I haven't seen you for ages.
trigger_lemmas: for a long time、for ages、for so long
keywords: 现在完成时,否定形式,for时间段,未发生动作,持续时间

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form 'have' + '-ed' with pronouns 'I' and 'we', and with a limited range of verbs.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时肯定式：'have' + '-ed' 结构（I/we主语）
examples: I have seen the Eiffel Tower and many old buildings.、I like Japanese people and I've been to Japan more than three times.、We have seen the Tower of London, Big Ben, the Houses of the Parliament and of course Buckingham Palace.
keywords: 现在完成时,肯定式,have + -ed,过去分词,个人经历

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form 'haven't' + '-ed' with 'I' with a limited range of verbs.

examples: I haven't eaten Italian food for a long time.、I haven't seen you for a long time.

keywords: 现在完成时,否定形式,haven't,过去分词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form 'have you' + '-ed' with with a limited range of verbs.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple

examples: Have you bought anything?、Hi Jools, How have you been?、Where have you been?

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple with a limited range of adverbs in the normal mid position.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时与副词搭配：never、just等副词的中位用法
examples: I have never seen a competition like that before, and I love it.、I have just seen your notice.
keywords: 现在完成时,副词中位,never,just,过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: EXPERIENCES. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple to talk about experiences up to now.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时：谈论至今的经历
examples: I've seen the British Museum.、We have visited the Coliseum and several museums.、After the film, we should go to "The Golden Pagoda" because I've never been there.、You know I haven't been to France before.
keywords: 现在完成时,经历,过去分词,have/has,never/ever

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST SIMPLE, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the past simple passive affirmative after a singular subject.
chinese_human_name: 过去时被动语态肯定句：单数主语
examples: It was built in 1880.、On Saturday morning I was invited to a sports competition.
keywords: 被动语态,过去时,单数主语,was,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT SIMPLE, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present simple passive affirmative with a singular subject.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时被动语态肯定句：单数主语
examples: The group is called "playmo".、I bought a T-shirt, it cost £42 because it is made of cotton.
trigger_lemmas: is made of、is called、is produced、is built
keywords: 被动语态,一般现在时,单数主语,过去分词,be动词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'BY' TO ADD INFORMATION. CanDo: Can use the passive with 'by' to add information about something already known.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态：用by补充已知信息
examples: It was bought by my uncle.、It's made by Sony-Ericsson, I love it …、… it was written by an excellent author, Lev Tolstoy.
keywords: 被动语态,by,执行者,过去分词,补充信息

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH RELATIVE CLAUSE AS POSTMODIFIER. CanDo: Can post-modify noun phrases by using a non-defining relative clause. ► Clauses: relative
chinese_human_name: 名词短语后置修饰：非限制性定语从句
examples: She's in a volleyball team like me, but we're not in the same one. She was for the other team, which lost.、You can always visit our Shopping Centre, which is one of the biggest in Brazil.
keywords: 非限制性定语从句,关系代词,逗号分隔,补充说明,which/who

content: Guideword: FORM: DETERMINER + NOUN. CanDo: Can form simple noun phrases by pre-modifying nouns with an increasing range of determiners.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语基础：限定词+名词的简单构成
examples: There are so many shops, you can play games, eat food like Chinese food.、I had so much fun!、I spent too much money, five hundred euros, but I don’t mind because they are beautiful!、I visited a lot of museums and I went shopping.、All of our classmates were there and some of my cousins too.
trigger_lemmas: many shops、much fun、a lot of museums、all of our classmates
keywords: 限定词,名词短语,可数名词,不可数名词,many/much区别

content: Guideword: FORM: DETERMINER + UNCOUNTABLE NOUN. CanDo: Can form simple noun phrases with a limited range of determiners + uncountable nouns.
chinese_human_name: 限定词+不可数名词短语：the food, some information
examples: The food was delicious and the music was great.、The weather was so cold.、I phoned for more information two days ago.、[talking about a book] It is very important because I need to do some homework in it.
keywords: 限定词,不可数名词,名词短语,定冠词,不定数量

content: Guideword: FORM: NOUN PHRASES WITH ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can pre-modify noun phrases with a limited range of more than one adjective.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语前置修饰：多个形容词的排列顺序
examples: I bought a beautiful pink skirt and a white top.、Lysiane is taller than me and she has short black hair.、It is a beautiful old city and there is the old wall around the city.、I left my small white bag.、Don't forget to wear old, comfortable clothes.
trigger_lemmas: beautiful pink skirt、short black hair、old comfortable clothes、small white bag
keywords: 名词短语,形容词顺序,前置修饰,观点形容词,颜色形容词

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH RELATIVE CLAUSE AS COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases by using a defining relative clause as a complement to a noun phrase. ► Clauses: relative
chinese_human_name: 名词短语：用定语从句作补语
examples: The mobile phone which I bought yesterday is brilliant.、The person who gave me it was my father.、The last day when we can see the movie is Thursday.、I want to invite you to a pop concert that is going to take place in the National Stadium.、The music that I like is Rock & Roll.
keywords: 定语从句,关系词,名词短语,限定性从句,补语

content: Guideword: FORM: POSSESSION WITH ''S' + NOUN. CanDo: Can use possessive determiner ''s' with a singular noun.
chinese_human_name: 名词所有格：单数名词加's表示所属关系
examples: It's my sister's jacket.、I bought a red tie because next Sunday it will be my father's birthday.、Yesterday about 8 pm, when I was coming back home from a shop, I saw two men near my neighbour's car.
keywords: 名词所有格,单数名词,所属关系,所有格's,物主表达

content: Guideword: FORM: '-ING' FORMS, OBJECT. CanDo: Can use the '-ing' forms of verbs as nouns, in object position, to refer to activities.
chinese_human_name: 动词-ing形式作名词：表示活动的动名词作宾语
examples: There we did a lot of things like swimming from the beach and going shopping.、I prefer dancing, but on Saturday I'd like to go to a jazz concert.、I practised windsurfing and scuba diving.
keywords: 动名词,-ing形式,宾语位置,活动指代,动词变形

content: Guideword: FORM: PLURAL '-IES'. CanDo: Can form plurals of countable nouns ending in a consonant plus '-y', by changing the 'y' to 'I' and adding '-es'.
chinese_human_name: 名词复数变化规则：辅音字母+y结尾变-ies
examples: I have a lot of hobbies.、There were lots of activities to do.、I bought some jeans and costumes because I have a lot of parties this month.
keywords: 复数形式,可数名词,辅音字母,y结尾,hobbies

content: Guideword: FORM: PLURAL '-ES'. CanDo: Can form plurals by adding '-es' to countable nouns ending in '-o', '-ch', '-s', '-sh', '-x' or '-z'.
chinese_human_name: 可数名词复数形式：以-o, -ch, -s, -sh, -x, -z结尾加'-es'
examples: The art classes after school are on Tuesdays.、Then I bought five different dresses.、You have to bring your pencil, oil paint, some paint brushes, and the teacher will give you a palette.、Usually it is meat and potatoes or special dishes.、Bring some sandwiches and drinks.、A box of Dairy milk and 2 boxes of pens.、We have to bring paintbrushes of different sizes …
keywords: 复数形式,-es结尾,可数名词,发音规则,辅音结尾

content: Guideword: FORM: IRREGULAR PLURAL NOUNS. CanDo: Can form some irregular plural nouns.
chinese_human_name: 不规则名词复数形式：常见不规则变化
examples: It was a sale and I bought some clothes for my children.、I ate fish and seafood, it was delicious.、She has black eyes, a beautiful round face and nice teeth.、The floor in the kitchen has many holes and I think there are mice.
keywords: 不规则名词,复数形式,单复数同形,元音变化,词尾变化

content: Guideword: FORM: UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of uncountable nouns.
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词基础用法：music、weather、meat等常见词汇
examples: I listen to music, I watch TV and I talk to my friends.、The weather there was cold.、Come to my house at 4.30 pm so we have time to get ready.、I ate a lot of meat.、Do you have any furniture in this room?、Bring some money with you.
trigger_lemmas: listen to music、a lot of meat、any furniture
keywords: 不可数名词,抽象概念,物质名词,量词短语,谓语动词单数

content: Guideword: FORM: NOUNS ONLY USED IN THE PLURAL. CanDo: Can use nouns that only have a plural form, with plural agreement.
chinese_human_name: 复数形式名词：只能以复数形式使用的名词
examples: I bought them because I feel comfortable when I am wearing these clothes.、The clothes are very cheap in this shop.、The jeans were expensive, but the other things were very cheap.、Please wear some shorts and a shirt.、I left my glasses in your house last night. I need them, because I can't see anything.
keywords: 复数名词,动词一致性,成对物品,集合名词,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'THE'. CanDo: Can use uncountable nouns with 'the' to talk about something specific.
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词与定冠词'the'的特定用法
examples: The music is going to be loud, since it's rap.、The weather was absolutely fine.、If you can't find the information about the new art class after school, please call me.
keywords: 不可数名词,定冠词'the',特指用法,具体情境,单数动词

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH DETERMINERS, QUANTITY. CanDo: Can use uncountable nouns with a limited range of quantity words and phrases including 'some', 'any', 'a lot of', 'more'. ► Determiners: quantity
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词与数量限定词搭配：some, any, a lot of, more
examples: It's really important for me, because I need to do some homework.、Now, I haven't got any money, but I am really happy!、We have had a lot of fun.、I'm going to find more information about the new art class.
keywords: 不可数名词,数量限定词,some,any,a lot of,more

content: Guideword: FORM: CONTAINERS, QUANTITY EXPRESSIONS. CanDo: Can refer to an individual example or quantity of an uncountable noun using words for containers and countable items.
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词的量化表达：容器词与数量短语
examples: We have to bring a bottle of water, trainers and a T-shirt or top.、You must bring with you two pencils, one rubber and a piece of paper.、I have a piece of news.、I can drink a cup of tea in a café.
keywords: 不可数名词,容器词,数量短语,量化表达,of结构

content: Guideword: FORM: PRONOUNS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of determiners as pronouns and indefinite pronouns in negative contexts.  ► Pronouns: quantity
chinese_human_name: 否定语境中的代词与不定代词：数量表达
examples: I bought a shirt, because I haven't got any.、As regards close friends, I don't have many.、Come at 5.00 pm. Don't bring anything.
trigger_lemmas: haven't got any、don't have many、don't bring anything
keywords: 否定句,数量代词,any,many,anything

content: Guideword: FORM: MODAL VERBS. CanDo: Can use negative forms of modal verbs. ► modal verbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词否定形式：can't, won't, shouldn't等
examples: I'm sorry I can't come to your wedding because I am very sick.、Sorry but I won't be in town on Wednesday 17th.、You shouldn't wear formal clothes.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,can't,won't,shouldn't,动词原形,缩写

content: Guideword: FORM: 'DO', IMPERATIVES. CanDo: Can form negative imperatives of main verbs with 'don’t' + main verb. ► Clauses: imperatives
chinese_human_name: 否定祈使句：don't + 动词原形
examples: Don't forget your electric guitar.、Don't be late.
keywords: 否定祈使句,don't,动词原形,指令表达,日常用语

content: Guideword: FORM: AUXILIARY VERBS 'BE', 'HAVE', PRESENT. CanDo: Can form negative statements of main verbs in the present continuous and present perfect with 'be' and 'have' + 'not/n't'.  ► present continuous ► present perfect
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时与现在完成时的否定形式：be/have + not/n't
examples: The gas is not working.、The window is broken and is not closing.、Now, I haven't got any money, but I am really happy!、I haven't tidied my room since I bought this mobile.、We have not got hot water so the water is very cold.
keywords: 否定句,现在进行时,现在完成时,助动词,not缩写

content: Guideword: FORM: AUXILIARY VERB 'DO', PAST. CanDo: Can form negative statements of main verbs in the past simple with 'didn’t' + main verb. ► past simple
chinese_human_name: 过去简单式否定句：didn't + 动词原形
examples: It was very sad that you didn't come to my birthday party but it's ok.、I didn't spend a lot of money: only £143.
keywords: 过去简单式,否定句,didn't,动词原形,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: DETERMINERS 'ANY', 'MUCH', 'MANY'. CanDo: Can use determiners 'any', 'much' and 'many' with nouns in negative contexts. ► Determiners: quantity
chinese_human_name: 否定语境中的数量限定词：any, much, many
examples: I bought them because I didn't have any shirts or hats.、I have only spent £25 because I haven't much money.、I'm in Bilbao, and here I haven't got many things to do.
trigger_lemmas: don't have any、haven't much、haven't got many、didn't see any
keywords: 否定句,数量限定词,any,much,many,可数名词,不可数名词

content: Guideword: FORM: DETERMINERS 'NO'. CanDo: Can use determiner 'no' with nouns.  ► Determiners: quantity
chinese_human_name: 限定词'no'的用法：表示'没有'
examples: I bought these clothes because I need them for my new job, but now I have no money because they cost £250.、I had no clothes to wear at John's party, so I went shopping yesterday.
keywords: 限定词,no,否定,数量,名词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE' + 'SURE' + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'I' + 'be' + 'sure' + clause.
chinese_human_name: 表达确信的句型：I + be + sure + 从句
examples: I'm sure I can beat you at chess.、I am not sure what I want to do but I am sure we will find something to do.、I’m sure that you will love it.
trigger_lemmas: i'm sure、i am sure、i'm not sure、be sure
keywords: be sure,从句,确信表达,不确定表达,that省略

content: Guideword: USE: PERMISSION. CanDo: Can use 'can' to give and refuse permission or talk about what is forbidden.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can：请求与拒绝许可
examples: You can wear anything you want.、You can’t bring your mobile phone.、You cannot wear jeans or flip-flops.
keywords: 情态动词,许可,禁止,can't,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WILL BE ABLE TO'. CanDo: Can use 'will' + 'be able to' + infinitive to talk about possibility and ability.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 将来能力表达：will be able to + 动词原形
examples: Will you be able to come this time?、[talking about contact lenses] Without them I will not be able to play football.、If you need a musical instrument, I can bring my guitar but unfortunately I won't be able to play it because I have never learned it.
trigger_lemmas: will be able to、won't be able to、be able to
keywords: 将来时态,能力表达,be able to,动词原形,可能性

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词have to的疑问句形式：如何提问义务与必要性
examples: What do you have to wear?、What do we have to bring?、Do you have to wear a skirt?、Have you got to bring a pencil?
keywords: have to,疑问句,义务,必要性,got to

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词否定形式：don't have to 与 haven't got to
examples: You don't have to bring many things with you.、About the transport, you do not have to worry as my daddy can drop us at the sports centre.、We haven't got to bring anything with us.
trigger_lemmas: don't have to、haven't got to、doesn't have to、hasn't got to
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,don't have to,haven't got to,不必

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词：have to 和 have got to 的肯定形式
examples: This weekend I have to go to a party.、We’ll meet at four o'clock because my mom has to go to the Shopping Centre then.、You have got to bring a cap for the sun.、For the art lessons we've got to bring a rubber, two pencils and some colour pencils.
trigger_lemmas: have to、has to、have got to、has got to
keywords: 情态动词,义务,必要性,肯定形式,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATION. CanDo: Can use 'have (got) to' to talk about obligations.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词：have (got) to 表示义务
examples: The concert starts at midnight but we have to go before then because we have got to buy our tickets.、You have to bring your swimming costume.
keywords: 义务,必要性,have to,has to,外部压力

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的肯定形式用法
examples: [talking about clothes] So I may need them.、I think it may be dirty.
keywords: 情态动词,可能性,肯定形式,动词原形,中等可能性

content: Guideword: USE: POSSIBILITY. CanDo: Can use 'may' to talk about weak possibility referring to the present and the future.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may：表示现在和未来的弱可能性
examples: [talking about an important document] It may be in our room inside my bag.、… bring some money with you. We may need it.、[talking about buying clothes for the summer] And the weather may be hot.
keywords: 情态动词,可能性,弱可能性,现在时,未来时,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的肯定形式用法
examples: The weather might be hot and sunny.、I think it might be in your bedroom.
keywords: 情态动词,可能性,推测,肯定形式,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: POSSIBILITY. CanDo: Can use 'might' to talk about weak possibility.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might：表示弱可能性的用法
examples: My dad isn’t working that day, he might take us.、[talking about something that is missing] It might be on the computer table.
keywords: 情态动词,弱可能性,推测,不确定性,might not

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的否定形式：mustn't和must not
examples: … you mustn't forget to buy some strawberry juice for us.、You must not wear a white colour shirt, you can only wear a dark colour shirt.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,must not,mustn't,禁止

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的肯定形式：表达必须、义务和强烈建议
examples: You must wear your sports shoes and you must also bring your racket!、I must be back at 10.15.
trigger_lemmas: must wear、must be、must bring、must stop、must finish
keywords: 情态动词,肯定形式,必须,义务,强烈建议,动词原形,主观必要性

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATION AND NECESSITY. CanDo: Can use 'must' with a limited range of pronouns ('I' and 'you') to talk about obligation and necessity.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must：表达义务与必要性（I/you主语）
examples: [talking about a mobile phone] It is very important to me because I must call my parents.、I will be at school, so you must arrive at 3 pm. You must take your towel, jeans and t-shirt with you.、I mustn't be late.、You mustn't forget your swimsuit.
keywords: 情态动词,义务,必要性,mustn't,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: OFFERS. CanDo: Can use 'shall I' to make offers.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall：用'shall I'提出帮助或建议
examples: Shall I go and buy some cake and crackers?、The tickets cost €25. Shall I buy you one?
trigger_lemmas: shall i、shall i get、shall i call、shall i turn
keywords: 情态动词,shall,提出帮助,礼貌建议,第一人称

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall的肯定形式用法
examples: We shall start tomorrow at 2 o'clock.、I shall be free on Sunday at 6 o'clock in the evening.
keywords: 情态动词,肯定形式,第一人称,未来时态,正式表达

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'shall' with 'we' to make suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall：用'shall we'提出建议
examples: Tomorrow evening there is Laura Pausini's concert in Turin. Shall we go?、Shall we go to a Korean restaurant after the film?
trigger_lemmas: shall we go、shall we eat、shall we meet、shall we try
keywords: shall,we,建议,情态动词,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall的疑问句用法
examples: Shall we meet at half past 4 in front of my house?、What time shall I come? And what shall I bring to the party?
keywords: 情态动词,疑问句,提出建议,征求意见,shall we

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的否定形式：shouldn't和should not
examples: You shouldn't miss it.、It is a new flat, so there shouldn't be any problems.、I think you should not wear your favourite clothes because they may get dirty.

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的肯定形式：表达建议、义务和期望
examples: You should come at 6 o'clock.、Someday we should go there together.、We should buy 2 tickets.
keywords: 情态动词,should,肯定形式,动词原形,建议

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的疑问句形式：征求意见与建议
examples: Should I wear special clothes?、It's going to be in São Paulo. Should we go by plane?
trigger_lemmas: should i、should we、should he、should she、should they
keywords: 情态动词,疑问句,征求意见,动词原形,should

content: Guideword: USE: ADVICE. CanDo: Can use 'should' to give advice.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should：用于给出建议
examples: It was only €70. It is pink. It looks very nice. My advice, you should buy this.、…on Monday, you will have to stay in this class for six hours so you should bring something to eat because you will be hungry.、You should take some money, because the ticket costs £4.00.
keywords: 情态动词,建议,动词原形,shouldn't,because

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'should' to make suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should：提出建议的用法
examples: I think we should meet at 2 pm, and my mother will take us there so don't worry.、I think you should meet me around 4 pm at my house.、You should bring your guitar.

content: Guideword: USE: PLANS AND INTENTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'will' to ask about plans and intentions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：询问计划和意图
examples: Will you come by bus?、Will you come with any friends?
trigger_lemmas: will you come、will you go、will you join、will you bring
keywords: 情态动词,will,询问计划,询问意图,未来时

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will的疑问句形式：询问未来意愿或安排
examples: Will you be at home?、I'm happy because I'll see you tomorrow, but what time will you be here?
trigger_lemmas: will you、what time will、when will、where will
keywords: 情态动词,疑问句,未来时态,will,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will的否定形式：won't与will not
examples: Don't worry, you won't need anything apart from some pencils and your art book.、I hope it will not be boring!
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,won't,will not,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: WILLINGNESS, OFFERS. CanDo: Can use 'will' to talk about willingness and offers
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：表达意愿和提供帮助
examples: My mother will get us there, and she will bring us to my house after too.
keywords: 情态动词,意愿表达,提供帮助,动词原形,日常交流

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AFTER 'IF', FUTURE SITUATIONS. CanDo: Can use 'will' in the main clause after an 'if-' clause to talk about possible future situations. ► conditionals
chinese_human_name: 条件句中的will：if从句后谈论未来可能情况
examples: If I need a camera, I will use my mobile phone.、And if my mum can, she will fetch you.、If you can help me, I will be very happy.
keywords: 条件句,if从句,will,未来可能,一般现在时

content: Guideword: USE: REQUESTS. CanDo: Can use 'will' to make requests in a limited range of contexts.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：用于提出请求
examples: Will you come with me?、Will you be able to visit some museums with me?
trigger_lemmas: will you、will you be able to
keywords: 情态动词,will,请求,疑问句,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would的否定形式：wouldn't与would not
examples: [talking about clothes] You wouldn't believe how much they cost!、I think we would not need much money.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,wouldn't,would not,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would的肯定形式：表达意愿与偏好
examples: I'd love to have a pen-friend in Japan.、[talking about what day to go to the cinema] I would prefer Sunday afternoon.
keywords: 情态动词,肯定形式,would like,would prefer,缩写形式

content: Guideword: USE: WISHES AND PREFERENCES. CanDo: Can use 'would' with a wide range of verbs to talk about wishes and preferences.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would：表达愿望与偏好
examples: I would prefer to go on Sunday, because on Sunday I have no school.、[talking about going to see a film] I'd prefer to see it tomorrow.、Bring your new CD! I'd love to hear it!
keywords: would,prefer,like,love,愿望,偏好,情态动词

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS WITH 'IT WOULD BE'. CanDo: Can use 'it would be' to make suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 使用'it would be'提出建议
examples: [talking about a jazz concert] It would be very good if you came with me.、It would be nice to bring your new computer game and some clothes.、It would be perfect if you arrived at 7.20.
trigger_lemmas: it would be、if you、to bring、to come
keywords: would,建议,委婉语气,虚拟语气,条件句

content: Guideword: USE: IMAGINED SITUATIONS. CanDo: Can use 'would' to talk about imagined situations.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would：描述想象情境
examples: I was thinking of painting my bedroom blue. It would look awesome.、It would be fun there.
trigger_lemmas: it would be、would look、would be fun
keywords: 情态动词,想象情境,假设,would,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS WITH 'LIKE'. CanDo: Can use the question form 'would you like'.
chinese_human_name: 礼貌邀请句型：would you like
examples: Sarah, would you like to play tennis this evening?、I'm going to a concert on Saturday. Would you like to go with me?、I want to watch the film, would you like to come with me?
trigger_lemmas: would you like、what would you like、would you like to
keywords: would you like,礼貌邀请,疑问句型,动词不定式,社交用语

content: Guideword: FORM: CLAUSE POSITION. CanDo: Can use adverbs of certainty and possibility ('maybe', 'perhaps'), before a clause or ellipted clause. ► adverbs: position
chinese_human_name: 可能性副词在句首或从句前的用法：maybe和perhaps
examples: I think I left my phone there, maybe in your kitchen.、Maybe we could visit that park you told me about or play at your house.、I want to buy new trousers and, perhaps, a T-shirt.、There you can dance, eat, drink and meet new friends (or perhaps a girlfriend).、Perhaps it's in the kitchen under the table.
keywords: 可能性副词,句首位置,从句修饰,不确定表达,委婉建议

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MID POSITION, HEDGING OR EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use adverbs in mid position or after main verb 'be', to modify an assertion, either through hedging or emphasis. ► adverbs: position
chinese_human_name: 副词中位用法：表示推测或强调
examples: It is probably in the sitting room on the table.、You should probably wear a T-shirt and shorts, with sneakers.、[talking about painting] It's definitely going to get messy.
keywords: 副词中位,弱化语气,强调语气,probably,definitely

content: Guideword: USE: REQUESTS. CanDo: Can use 'could' to make requests.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could：礼貌请求的用法
examples: Could you help me to paint my bedroom?、I left my umbrella in your house yesterday. … Could you bring it to school tomorrow, please?
keywords: 情态动词,礼貌请求,could you,疑问句,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: ABILITY. CanDo: Can use the negative form of 'could' to talk about inability.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could的否定形式：表示过去或现在的能力不足
examples: [talking about the key to an office] I couldn't work without it.、I couldn't buy the T-shirt because it was too expensive, but the other things were very nice and quite cheap, so I bought them.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,能力不足,过去时态,原因状语

chinese_human_name: 情态动词could的肯定形式：表达建议、可能性与能力

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could的疑问句形式：礼貌请求与询问可能性

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'could' with a limited range of verbs to make suggestions.

keywords: 情态动词,建议,委婉语气,动词原形,日常对话

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE WITH 'WILL'. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with 'will'.

keywords: 将来进行时,肯定式,will be doing,动词-ing,时间状语

content: Guideword: USE: FUTURE ARRANGEMENTS. CanDo: Can use the future continuous with 'will' to talk about an event or action in progress at a specified time in the future.
chinese_human_name: 将来进行时：表示未来特定时间正在进行的动作
examples: Tomorrow please come at 4.30 pm because I'll be working before.、Tomorrow I'll be studying in the morning, so you can come at 2.
trigger_lemmas: at 4:30 pm、in the morning、this time tomorrow、next week at
keywords: 将来进行时,will be,动词-ing,未来时间状语,进行性动作

examples: Without them I will not be able to play football.、Can you come at 7 o'clock? I won't be at home before.

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PREPOSITIONAL PHRASES, FRONTING. CanDo: Can use prepositional phrases in the front position for focus.
chinese_human_name: 介词短语前置：用于强调的句子开头位置
examples: In the morning, I go to the beach.、In my country, the most popular food is Paella, which is a kind of rice with seafood, really tasty.、From your house, take the first turning on your left after the roundabout.
trigger_lemmas: in the morning、in my country、from your house、at night
keywords: 介词短语,前置,强调,逗号,句首位置

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'AS YOU KNOW', ORGANISING, MARKING SHARED KNOWLEDGE. CanDo: Can use 'as you know' as a discourse marker of shared knowledge.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 话语标记语：'as you know' 表示共享知识
examples: I can't come to your wedding because, as you know, I live in England and on Thursday 18th July I'm going to take the FCE exam.、As you know, my parents are leaving home tomorrow night to go to Spain.
keywords: 话语标记语,共享知识,书面语,连贯性,背景信息

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'SO', SUMMARISING, INFORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'so' as a discourse marker to summarise, usually in informal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 话语标记词'so'：用于总结的非正式用法
examples: So, what do you think?、[talking about not being able to make it to a party] I have got an appointment with my dentist.  So, I'm really sorry about that and I'm getting so sad.、I'll be free at 15.00. So, I'll be at your house at 15.30.
keywords: 话语标记词,总结,非正式,过渡,口语化

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE' + ADJECTIVES, SPECIFYING. CanDo: Can use 'the' + adjectives in a noun phrase, to specify.
chinese_human_name: 定冠词'the' + 形容词：用于特指名词短语

keywords: 定冠词,特指,形容词,名词短语,the + 形容词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THE' + SUPERLATIVES. CanDo: Can form a noun phrase with 'the' + superlative adjectives + noun.

If you are interested this house, please call me on my mobile phone.
