chinese_human_name: 不可数名词的否定用法：much在否定句中的使用
examples: But we didn't have much money, so we didn't buy many things.、I want to sell the television because I haven't got much time to watch it.
trigger_lemmas: don't have much、haven't got much、not much
keywords: much,不可数名词,否定句,数量,don't have much

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH SINGULAR NOUNS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of quantifying determiners with singular nouns ('each', 'an', 'one' and numbers).
chinese_human_name: 限定词与单数名词搭配：each、an、one及数字的用法
examples: The new art class starts next Monday and each class is about 1 hour long.、Yesterday I bought three t-shirts: one blue t-shirt, one pink t-shirt and one yellow t-shirt.、We have an extra ticket and are wanting you to come.
keywords: 限定词,单数名词,each,an,one,数字,数量表达

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH PLURAL AND UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use a range of quantifying determiners ('some', 'any', 'no', 'more', 'a lot of') with both plural nouns and uncountable nouns.
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词：some、any、no、more、a lot of与复数名词和不可数名词的搭配使用
examples: I think we should bring some water to drink.、I bought them because I don't have any clothes for the summer and I need them!、The weather was great. There were no clouds.、I want to see that film but I have no time today because I have more work at home.、If you want more details, you can call this number.、We will meet at my house at 10.15, so we will have more time in the club.、We danced, played games and had lots of fun .
trigger_lemmas: some water、any clothes、no clouds、more work、a lot of details
keywords: 数量限定词,复数名词,不可数名词,some,any,no,more,a lot of

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH PLURAL NOUNS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of quantifying determiners with plural nouns ('all', 'both', 'a few').
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词与复数名词搭配：all, both, a few
examples: This notice is for all students: we are going to have a concert at school.、It was exciting as both teams played well, but India won the match.、I'm just writing to say hello, and to tell you a few things.
keywords: 数量限定词,复数名词,all,both,a few

content: Guideword: FORM: 'MANY' WITH PLURAL NOUNS, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'many' with plural nouns in negative contexts.
chinese_human_name: 否定句中的'many'与复数名词搭配
examples: There are n't many tickets.、I bought them because I have n't got many winter clothes.
trigger_lemmas: not many、haven't got many、don't have many
keywords: many,复数名词,否定句,数量,可数名词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'SO MANY' WITH PLURAL NOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'so many' and 'too many' with plural nouns.
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词：so many 和 too many 与复数名词的搭配
examples: We played so many games, like dog and bone, four corners, and many more.、We visited so many places, mostly monuments. The weather was perfect.、I know, I bought too many things but I liked all of them.
keywords: so many,too many,复数名词,数量限定词,语气差异

content: Guideword: FORM: DETERMINER + 'OF' + DETERMINER. CanDo: Can use a range of quantifying determiners + 'of' + determiner ('all of', 'some of', 'both of', 'many of', 'any of', number + 'of', 'each of'). ► pronouns: quantity
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词+of+限定词结构：all of, some of, both of等
examples: I spent all of my money!、Some of my friends gave me books.、The competition was very tough because both of the teams were good.、Many of my relatives and friends had come.、I enjoyed the party. I had invited five of my friends and my family.、Without a library card you can't take any of the books with you.
trigger_lemmas: all of、some of、both of、many of、any of、five of、each of
keywords: 数量限定词,of,限定词,整体与部分,all of,some of,both of

content: Guideword: FORM: SIMPLE. CanDo: Can use a limited range of simple subordinating conjunctions '(if, when, so, while)' to introduce a subordinate clause.
chinese_human_name: 简单从属连词：if, when, so, while 引导从句
examples: But if you don't take your car, you can rent a bike in the park too.、If I need a camera, I will use my mobile phone.、My father bought it for me when he saw my grades at school.、When you buy a pair of shoes, the second pair is free.、My father said that I should use green, but I don't like green, so I decided to use blue.、All of us were dancing while my father sang my favourite song.
keywords: 从属连词,条件从句,时间从句,结果从句,复合句

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE LIKE' + NOUN OR PRONOUN. CanDo: Can use 'be' + 'like' + noun or pronoun.
chinese_human_name: 比较结构：be like + 名词/代词
examples: I like her because she is like me.、When you get to the station, you'll take "The Funiculaire." It's like a little train.
keywords: be like,相似性,比较结构,名词,代词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MULTIPLE MAIN CLAUSES, INSTRUCTIONS. CanDo: Can combine multiple main clauses, with commas and conjunctions expressing order, often to give instructions or directions.
chinese_human_name: 并列主句：用逗号和连词表达顺序的指令或方向说明
examples: Your house is near to mine so turn down the 5th street and then go straight almost all the way. When you see the purple street turn there, then go to the left to the Red street, that is my street, my house is 17.、You start at your house, go straight ahead, then turn right.
keywords: 并列主句,逗号,连词,顺序表达,指令说明

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can form an affirmative imperative with the base form of a main verb.
chinese_human_name: 肯定祈使句：动词原形表达指令或请求
examples: Goodbye. Write soon.、Bring your swim-suit for the swimming pool.、Call me if you need anything.
keywords: 祈使句,动词原形,肯定形式,指令,省略主语

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE DECLARATIVE, MODAL AUXILIARY VERBS. CanDo: Can form a simple negative declarative clause with modal verb + 'not' or 'n't'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词否定句：情态动词+not/n't的简单否定陈述句
examples: I know you couldn't come to my party so I want to tell you about my presents and party.、I can't wait to see you and tell you the rest.、You won't have to bring anything.、When I worked in the sushi bar, I could not eat lunch and dinner at the normal time. Sometimes I ate lunch at 3pm and dinner was at 11pm.、Once you have started, you will not want to stop.
keywords: 情态动词,否定句,not/n't,动词原形,简单陈述句

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE DECLARATIVE WITH 'HAVE'. CanDo: Can form a simple negative declarative clause with auxiliary 'have' + 'not' or 'n't' and 'have' + 'not' or 'n't (got)'
chinese_human_name: 否定陈述句：使用have/have got的否定形式
examples: I haven't eaten Italian food for a long time.、… now I haven't got any money.、I bought them because I hadn't got any clothes for summer.
keywords: 否定陈述句,have/has,not/n't,have got,过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: INSTRUCTIONS. CanDo: Can use the imperative to give instructions.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句：用于给出指令
examples: Take a taxi to the Petrol station then call me.、The easiest way to get to my house is by Underground. Take line 14 and then change to line 8. Walk a little bit more and then you arrive.、Wear an apron over your clothes.、Bring some money with you.、Take a yellow bus near Green Park at 5.45 pm. Remember to bring your camera!
keywords: 祈使句,动词原形,指令,省略主语,否定形式

content: Guideword: USE: EMPHASISING AN INSTRUCTION. CanDo: Can use negative imperative after an instruction, for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句强调用法：指令后加否定祈使句
examples: Our house is next to the school and my home is opposite the post office. Don't forget.、We'll meet at my house at 3 o'clock. Don't be late!
keywords: 祈使句,否定祈使句,强调,指令,Don't

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'LET'S', SUGGESTION. CanDo: Can use 'let's' + base form of a main verb, for first person plural imperatives to make a suggestion.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句：用'let's'提出建议
examples: The concert will be in Canecão. Let's go!!!、Let's go to the town centre, it is an interesting place.、Let's meet at half past four.
keywords: let's,祈使句,建议,动词原形,第一人称复数

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can form a negative imperative with the auxiliary verb 'do' + 'n't' + base form of a main verb, to give advice, instructions or orders.
chinese_human_name: 否定祈使句：用don't + 动词原形表达建议、指令或命令
examples: Don't tell Lucy, please.、Don't bring your children please.、Don't worry, I'll be there.
keywords: 否定祈使句,don't,动词原形,建议指令,省略主语

content: Guideword: USE: CLOSINGS. CanDo: Can use the imperative to give instructions, often at the end of a letter or when saying goodbye to someone.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句：书信结尾与告别时的指令表达
examples: Email or phone me.、Write to me soon. Take care.、Come soon.
trigger_lemmas: take care、write soon、keep in touch、let me know
keywords: 祈使句,书信结尾,告别,指令表达,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE INTERROGATIVE, WITH MODAL AUXILIARY VERBS. CanDo: Can form interrogative clauses ('yes/no' forms) with modal auxiliary verbs.
chinese_human_name: 情态助动词构成的一般疑问句（肯定形式）
examples: Would you like to come with me?、Will you go with me?、Can I come tomorrow to collect it?、Shall we meet at 7.30 pm?
keywords: 情态助动词,一般疑问句,动词原形,肯定形式,yes/no回答

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE INTERROGATIVE, WITH AUXILIARY 'BE/HAVE'. CanDo: Can form interrogative clauses ('yes/no' forms) with auxiliary 'be' and 'have'.
chinese_human_name: 使用be/have构成一般疑问句（肯定形式）
examples: Are you going to the new art class?、Have you got a new dress for the party?
trigger_lemmas: are you、have you got、is she、has he
keywords: 一般疑问句,助动词 be,助动词 have,词序,have got

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE INTERROGATIVE. CanDo: Can form interrogative clauses ('yes/no' forms) of main lexical verbs with auxiliary 'do'.
chinese_human_name: 一般疑问句：使用助动词do/does/did构成肯定式疑问句
examples: Do you remember Julie?、Did you buy a new mobile phone?
keywords: 一般疑问句,助动词do,动词原形,肯定式疑问,时态对应

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE 'WH-' INTERROGATIVE. CanDo: Can form 'wh-' interrogative clauses with a 'wh-' word as object.
chinese_human_name: A2级疑问句：以'wh-'词作宾语的肯定式疑问句
examples: When are you coming here?、What have you bought?、And what must I bring?、When can we meet?、Where did you go?、How  do you feel?
trigger_lemmas: what have、when are、where did、and what must
keywords: wh-疑问句,宾语,词序,助动词,肯定式

content: Guideword: FORM: 'WHAT A PITY' + ('THAT') CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'What a pity' + ('that') clause.
chinese_human_name: 感叹句结构：What a pity + (that)从句
examples: What a pity that you didn't come.、What a pity you lost the information about the new art class.
keywords: 感叹句,遗憾表达,that从句,口语表达,情感表达

content: Guideword: FORM: 'WHAT A …!'. CanDo: Can use 'What a' + noun phrase and 'What a' + noun phrase + clause.
chinese_human_name: 感叹句结构：What a + 名词短语
examples: What a brilliant idea.、What a nice present I have!、What a great afternoon I had yesterday!
keywords: 感叹句,What a,名词短语,可数名词单数,情感表达

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE INTERROGATIVE. CanDo: Can form negative interrogative clauses.
chinese_human_name: 否定疑问句：Isn't it great? 的构成与用法
examples: Isn't it great?、Don't you like pizza?、[Talking about a car] I bought one. Didn't I tell you?
keywords: 否定疑问句,助动词,情态动词,词序,口语表达

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE 'WH-' INTERROGATIVE. CanDo: Can form negative 'wh-' interrogative clauses.
chinese_human_name: 否定式WH疑问句：Why don't we...? 等句型
examples: Why don't we watch a film?、Why didn't you come with me?、Why don't you ask Jennifer to go with you?、Why couldn't you come? It was fun.
keywords: 否定式WH疑问句,疑问词,助动词否定形式,建议句型,原因询问

content: Guideword: FORM: DEFINING, SUBJECT, WITH 'WHO'. CanDo: Can use a defining relative clause with 'who' as the subject.
chinese_human_name: 限定性定语从句：用who作主语
examples: It's about a girl who went to the war when she was 22 years old.、I'd like a pen-friend who really likes music and reading.、I can tell you that I agree with people who think that Stonehenge is magic place.
trigger_lemmas: a person who、people who、someone who、friends who
keywords: 限定性定语从句,who,主语,关系代词,修饰名词

content: Guideword: FORM: DEFINING, SUBJECT, WITH 'WHICH'. CanDo: Can use a defining relative clause with 'which' as the subject.
chinese_human_name: 限定性定语从句：用which作主语
examples: At the end of the game, the KASAS sang to Hagas a piece of music which makes me cry. Suzanna watched with me and she cried alot.、You should wear clothes which can get dirty.、I bought a t-shirt which has a picture of a car on it and I bought a shirt for my brother.
keywords: 限定性定语从句,which,主语,物,先行词

content: Guideword: FORM: DEFINING, OBJECT, WITH 'THAT'. CanDo: Can use a defining relative clause with 'that' as the object.
chinese_human_name: 限定性定语从句：用that作宾语
examples: The team that I like is called 'The Monkeys', but Paty prefers 'The Walls'.、I bought some clothes that I will need for my trip to Greece.、Please, wear clothes that you can get dirty; use old clothes, okay?
trigger_lemmas: the team that、clothes that、book that、movie that
keywords: 限定性定语从句,关系代词that,宾语省略,修饰名词,陈述语序

content: Guideword: FORM: NON-DEFINING, SUBJECT, WITH 'WHO'. CanDo: Can use a non-defining relative clause with 'who' as the subject.
chinese_human_name: 非限定性定语从句：用who作主语
examples: I watched it with my brother who was also interested in sports.、It's given by Jenny who is one of my best friends.、I want my mobile before this afternoon because my parents who are in Japan will call me.
keywords: 非限定性定语从句,who,逗号,主语,附加信息

content: Guideword: FORM: NON-DEFINING, SUBJECT, WITH 'WHICH'. CanDo: Can use a non-defining relative clause with 'which' as the subject,.
chinese_human_name: 非限定性定语从句：用which作主语
examples: I bought it in Peter's Mobile shop, which is near to my home.、I've been to Cardiff which is the capital city of Wales.、I visited a museum and an exhibition which were really excellent.、I bought two shirts, which cost £20 and four sweatshirts, which were a little expensive.、The mobile phone is green, which is my favourite colour.
keywords: 非限定性定语从句,which,逗号,主语,附加信息

content: Guideword: FORM: DEFINING, OBJECT, WITH 'WHICH'. CanDo: Can use a defining relative clause with 'which' as the object.
chinese_human_name: 限定性关系从句：用which作宾语
examples: I came to your house yesterday with the computer game which I borrowed from Mayank.、The coffee-cup which my good friend gave me is pretty.、Sorry, I can't do anything to help because I will try again to pass an exam which I failed last year.、The colour which I prefer is pink, so we will use pink.
keywords: 限定性关系从句,which,宾语,先行词,事物指代

content: Guideword: FORM: NON-DEFINING, OBJECT, WITH 'WHICH'. CanDo: Can use a non-defining relative clause with 'which' as the object.
chinese_human_name: 非限定性定语从句：用which作宾语
examples: The best of all was a marble statue which my aunt gave me.、Thanks for your letter which I received a few days ago.
keywords: 非限定性定语从句,which,宾语,逗号,额外信息

content: Guideword: FORM: DEFINING, WITHOUT PRONOUN. CanDo: Can use a defining relative clause, without a relative pronoun.
examples: My friends said the clothes I wore were very old, and they didn't like them.、All my friends gave me a present but the one I liked best was John's.、Here I have the information you want.、[talking about video calls] You can see the person you are calling LIVE!!!

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF' CLAUSES, CONDITIONS. CanDo: Can use a finite subordinate clause with 'if', before or after a main clause, to introduce conditions. ► clauses: conditionals
chinese_human_name: 条件从句：使用'if'引导的条件句
examples: I would be very happy if you visit me in Dublin.、I will come see you on Friday if it’s ok with you.、If you want to come, just tell me.
trigger_lemmas: if you want、if it's ok、if possible、if necessary
keywords: 条件从句,if从句,真实条件句,一般现在时,主从句结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PURPOSE. CanDo: Can use a non-finite subordinate clause with 'to', to introduce purpose.
chinese_human_name: 非限定性目的状语从句：用to引导表示目的
examples: To get to my house you'll have to take the 5th avenue and go 6 streets to the left and at the bottom you'll see another street, go 3 streets to the right and there you'll find my house.、To reach my house, you just have to go to the book shop and turn left.、To contact me you can call me on my mobile phone.
trigger_lemmas: to get to、to reach、to contact、to find
keywords: 目的状语,非限定性从句,to引导,动词原形,日常指示

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: TIME. CanDo: Can use a finite subordinate clause with time conjunctions, before or after a main clause.
chinese_human_name: 时间状语从句：when/while引导的从属分句
examples: I feel comfortable when I am wearing these clothes.、When I bought my computer, the price was 1000 pounds.、When you are outside my home, phone me.、Mike and I were watching it while we were eating pizza.
keywords: 时间状语从句,从属分句,when,while,时间连词

content: Guideword: USE: 'IF' CLAUSE + IMPERATIVE, HEDGING. CanDo: Can use an 'if-' clause ('if you want', 'like', 'prefer') to soften the directness of imperatives, offers or suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 条件句软化指令：if you want/like/prefer + 祈使句/建议
examples: Bring some films if you want.、Call me if you like.、Please, come here wearing a white T-shirt and a skirt, or shorts if you prefer.、If you want I can help you with the music.、If you like, you could bring some drinks.、We can go by bus or if you prefer we can go in my car.
trigger_lemmas: if you want、if you like、if you prefer
keywords: 条件从句,软化指令,祈使句,礼貌表达,if you want

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PRESENT SIMPLE 'IF' CLAUSE, REAL CONDITIONS. CanDo: Can use 'if' + present simple with present simple, 'can' or imperative in the main clause to refer to things that are true now or very likely to happen.
chinese_human_name: 真实条件句：if + 一般现在时，表示现在或很可能发生的情况
examples: If I have spare time I always read a book.、If you need to contact me, here is my number: 07938776341, so just call me.、If you need some help I'm here to organise the meeting or to make the invitations.、You can get to my house if you take the number 35 bus.、If you need more information, call me.
trigger_lemmas: if you need、if you want、if i have、if you take
keywords: 真实条件句,if从句,一般现在时,can,祈使句

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT SIMPLE 'IF' CLAUSE + IMPERATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'if' + present simple, with an imperative in the main clause.
chinese_human_name: 条件句：If + 一般现在时 + 祈使句
examples: If you find it, call me.、If you want to come, just tell me.
trigger_lemmas: if you see、if you need、if you want、if you have
keywords: 条件句,if从句,一般现在时,祈使句,指令

content: Guideword: FORM: 'IF' + PRESENT SIMPLE. CanDo: Can form conditional subordinate clause with 'if' + present simple.
chinese_human_name: 条件从句：if + 一般现在时
examples: It is 3 hours long, and if you want to pass it you will have to study very hard, it is very difficult.、If you buy a gift for me, please buy a book, because I love to read.、If you agree, we can go shopping after the film.
trigger_lemmas: if you want、if you have、if it is、if we can
keywords: 条件从句,if,一般现在时,真实条件,句型结构

content: Guideword: USE: DEGREE WITH VERBS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs and adverb phrases ('so much', 'a lot') with verbs to indicate degree or intensity. ► determiners
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 副词短语表示程度：so much, a lot 与动词搭配
examples: I am looking forward to seeing you so much!、We listened to music and we danced a lot too.
keywords: 副词短语,程度副词,so much,a lot,动词修饰

content: Guideword: USE: LINKING. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs ('also', 'so', 'however') to show a relationship between two clauses or sentences.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 连接副词：also、so、however的基本用法
examples: I also bought some t-shirts.、[talking about paint] I don't like green, so I decided to use blue, could you help me to paint my room?、Yesterday I bought some clothes: trousers and skirts … However, the clothes were cheap.
keywords: 连接副词,also,so,however,逻辑关系

content: Guideword: USE: TIME. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs ('yesterday', 'just', 'now', 'already',) to refer to the timing of an event.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 时间副词：yesterday, just, now, already的基本用法
examples: Yesterday I went shopping.、I've just seen your mail.、I am working very hard now because I want to earn some money.、[talking about a film] I've already seen it.
keywords: 时间副词,yesterday,just,now,already,现在完成时,一般过去时,现在进行时

content: Guideword: USE: MANNER. CanDo: Can use a limited range of manner adverbs and adverb phrases to modify how something happens.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 方式副词与副词短语：描述动作如何发生
examples: … both the players played well.、You must go straight, then turn left.、Some of them can swim very fast.、[talking about a bike] It's very colourfull, and it goes very quickly.
keywords: 方式副词,副词短语,修饰动词,词序,well,fast,quickly,straight

content: Guideword: USE: FREQUENCY. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs ('usually', 'often', 'never', 'weekly') to talk about frequency.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 频率副词：usually、often、never、weekly等用法
examples: People usually try to eat their breakfast between 7 and 9 am.、I have to pay weekly or monthly?、I often go to the Shanghai Museum.、You never remember anything!
keywords: 频率副词,usually,often,never,weekly

content: Guideword: USE: DEGREE, WITH ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use a limited range of degree adverbs ('so', 'quite', 'too') to modify adjectives.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰形容词：so、quite、too的用法
examples: I went to Vinpearland. It's so beautiful.、It was quite expensive, it cost £100.、The weather was too hot.
keywords: 程度副词,形容词,so,quite,too,修饰,词序

content: Guideword: USE: FOCUS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs ('only', 'just') to focus on or point to something.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 副词聚焦用法：only和just的强调功能
examples: [talking about  a class] It's only two hours.、It was only €70. It is pink. it looks very nice.、It was just £15.
keywords: 副词,聚焦,强调,only,just

content: Guideword: USE: SEQUENCING. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs and adverb phrases ('first', 'then', 'after that') to order segments of discourse.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 副词短语：顺序表达（first, then, after that）
examples: First we had a dinner in a very expensive restaurant, then we went to a disco.、We can meet at 6 pm at my house, and then we can get to the sports centre by bus.、[talking about a children's party games] First, we played housie and blind man's bluff. After that a magician showed us a lot of magic tricks.
keywords: 顺序副词,first,then,after that,话语组织

content: Guideword: USE: STANCE. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs ('actually', 'unfortunately', 'of course', 'I’m sorry') to indicate an attitude or viewpoint.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 态度副词：actually, unfortunately, of course, I'm sorry
examples: It's very nice that you're going to help me to paint my bedroom. Actually I want you to decide what colour that my room should be.、Unfortunately, my team lost.、[talking about a watch] It costs €450 and of course it is black. You know black is my favorite color.、I'm sorry you can't find it.
keywords: 态度副词,actually,unfortunately,of course,I'm sorry

content: Guideword: USE: CERTAINTY. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adverbs ('maybe', 'perhaps') to indicate degrees of certainty.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 表示不确定性的副词：maybe和perhaps的用法
examples: Or maybe we can walk to there, because it's not far from my house.、Perhaps I left it in your living room.
keywords: 副词,不确定性,可能性,maybe,perhaps,程度副词,猜测表达

content: Guideword: FORM: TIME  and SEQUENCING, MODIFYING CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use time and sequencing adverbs to modify clauses and sentences.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 时间与顺序副词：修饰句子和从句
examples: Yesterday I went shopping and bought some clothes.、First we had dinner in my house and after we went to the pub.、I just heard about your accident.、I often eat it at weekends.
keywords: 时间副词,顺序副词,修饰从句,词序,事件顺序

content: Guideword: FORM: MANNER, MODIFYING VERBS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of manner adverbs to modify verbs.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 方式副词修饰动词：快速、轻松地描述动作
examples: I really liked it because all the candidates were professional and swam very fast.、I learned to use my phone very quickly and easily.
keywords: 方式副词,修饰动词,副词位置,-ly结尾,动作描述

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, MODIFYING ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use a range of degree adverbs to modify common gradable adjectives.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰形容词：so、really、too等用法
examples: I'm so happy because you can come!、[referring to a lost book] It's really important for me, because I need to do some homework.、But it is too expensive.
keywords: 程度副词,可分级形容词,so,really,too,修饰,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM: END POSITION, MANNER. CanDo: Can use manner adverbs in the usual end position.
chinese_human_name: 方式副词在句末位置的使用
examples: Please answer me quickly because there are only eleven tickets.、My house is opposite the train station so you can find it easily.
keywords: 方式副词,句末位置,词序,动作方式,常见搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: MID POSITION. CanDo: Can use adverbs in mid position between the subject and the main verb and after modal verbs, auxiliary verbs and 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 副词中位：主语与主要动词之间的位置
examples: I bought it because it is very pretty, but it wasn't expensive, I only spent thirty pounds!、We also eat rice every day.、Yes, I have finally bought a mobile phone.、We can also go to the meeting on Saturday evening.、Nick, I would really like to help with the concert.
keywords: 副词中位,主语,主要动词,情态动词,助动词,be动词,频率副词,方式副词,程度副词

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, BEFORE ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of degree adverbs before an adjective.
chinese_human_name: 程度副词在形容词前的用法
examples: I'm so glad you are coming.、They are quite expensive.、The only bad thing is, it was too cold!
keywords: 程度副词,形容词,修饰,词序,so quite too

content: Guideword: FORM: FRONT POSITION. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs in front position.
chinese_human_name: 副词前置用法：句首位置
examples: [talking about taking a language course] However I can study only on Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday, because I am working in the restaurant.、Perhaps I left it in your living room.、Just wait right at the door, I will be there.
keywords: 副词前置,句首位置,perhaps,however,just

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, END POSITION. CanDo: Can use degree adverbs in end position.
chinese_human_name: 程度副词在句末位置的用法
examples: I miss you a lot.、I am looking forward to seeing you so much!
keywords: 程度副词,句末位置,a lot,so much,强调程度

content: Guideword: FORM: SENTENCE ADVERB,  FRONT POSITION. CanDo: Can use evaluative, viewpoint and sequencing adverbs outside the clause, in front position, as a cohesive device to link to a previous statement in a preceding clause.
chinese_human_name: 句首副词：评价、观点与顺序副词的句首位置用法
examples: It's very nice that you're going to help me to paint my bedroom. Actually I want you to decide what colour that my room should be.、Unfortunately, my team lost.、First, I bought one pair of shoes that cost €50 and then I bought a dress that cost me €75.
keywords: 句首副词,评价副词,观点副词,顺序副词,衔接手段

content: Guideword: FORM: ADVERB + ADVERB. CanDo: Can modify a limited range of adverbs of time, degree, and manner with other adverbs.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词短语构成：副词修饰副词
examples: I love it so much.、I don't eat it very often, usually on Saturday.、I really need it right now because I'm waiting for a call from a department store.、[talking about running shoes] I usually run twice a week and I like them because they weigh only 120 grams, and I can run very fast.、I hope to fix the problem very quickly.
keywords: 副词短语,副词修饰副词,时间副词,程度副词,方式副词

content: Guideword: FORM: COMBINING TWO ADJECTIVES WITH 'BUT'. CanDo: Can use 'but' to join a limited range of common adjectives, after 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 形容词连接：用'but'连接两个形容词
examples: The weather was cloudy but fine.、It was cheap but beautiful.
trigger_lemmas: cloudy but fine、cheap but beautiful、old but kind、small but useful
keywords: but,形容词连接,对比,be动词,常见搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: + -IER. CanDo: Can form comparative adjectives with adjectives of two syllables ending in '-y' by changing the 'y' to an 'I' and adding '-er'.
chinese_human_name: 双音节以-y结尾形容词的比较级：变y为i加-er
examples: I like it because it's small and easier to use than other phones.、The students were happier and there were lots of stories for their parents.
keywords: 比较级,双音节形容词,以-y结尾,变y为i,加-er

content: Guideword: FORM: BEFORE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use comparative adjectives attributively, before nouns.
chinese_human_name: 形容词比较级作定语：放在名词前
examples: I just watched a cricket match with my younger brother and my father.、I bought the shoes and the t-shirt for my older brother's party.、I want to take this course because I want to know more about computers, so that I can get a better job.
keywords: 比较级形容词,定语,名词前,相对特征,younger brother

content: Guideword: FORM: + -ER. CanDo: Can form comparative adjectives from adjectives of one syllable by adding '-er'.
chinese_human_name: 单音节形容词比较级：加-er规则
examples: I played computer games with my older brother.、The shirt was cheaper than the trousers.、It is easy to use and it is smaller than the old one.
keywords: 比较级,单音节形容词,-er后缀,than,两者比较

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'MORE'. CanDo: Can form a range of comparative adjective phrases using 'more' + longer adjectives (usually three or more syllables).
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词：使用'more'修饰多音节形容词
examples: I think you must be more careful.、It was more expensive than the other clothes.
keywords: 比较级,多音节形容词,more,than,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM: ENDING IN '-E' + '-R'. CanDo: Can form comparative adjectives with adjectives of one syllable ending in 'e', by adding '-r'.
chinese_human_name: 单音节形容词比较级：以-e结尾加-r
examples: [talking about an alternative plan] I think it will be nicer.、You can come by boat, but I prefer to come by aeroplane because it is safer.
keywords: 比较级,单音节形容词,以-e结尾,加-r规则,日常比较

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEMENT OF 'BE'. CanDo: Can use comparative adjectives as a complement of 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词作be动词补语：描述更优选择
examples: Sam, It would be better if you came after 4.30 p.m.、You can come by bus, it's easier.、You need to wear shorts and a t-shirt so you are more comfortable.
trigger_lemmas: be better、be easier、be more comfortable、be faster
keywords: 比较级形容词,be动词补语,建议表达,比较选择,日常用语

content: Guideword: FORM: IRREGULAR. CanDo: Can form irregular comparative adjectives.
chinese_human_name: 形容词比较级：不规则变化形式
examples: What colour do you think is better?、For further information, contact Joey Hung.
keywords: 不规则比较级,形容词比较,better,further,比较句型

content: Guideword: FORM: DOUBLE CONSONANT + '-ER'. CanDo: Can form comparative adjectives with adjectives of one syllable with a short vowel, by doubling the final consonant and adding '-er'
chinese_human_name: 单音节形容词比较级：短元音+双写辅音+er
examples: The rooms are all very beautiful, but I prefer my room because is bigger.、I bought lots of T-shirts because the weather is getting hotter.
keywords: 比较级,单音节形容词,双写辅音,短元音,er后缀

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'THAN'. CanDo: Can use a comparative adjective with 'than' to compare two nouns or noun phrases.► comparative clauses
chinese_human_name: 形容词比较级：使用'than'比较两个事物
examples: It's smaller than my old phone and I like it because it has bluetooth and it isn't very expensive.、The weather in Thailand was hotter than Vietnam, but I was alright!、My new mobile is more interesting than my old mobile.
keywords: 形容词比较级,than,比较两个事物,句型结构,词形变化

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'TOO'. CanDo: Can use 'too' with common gradable adjectives.
chinese_human_name: 形容词修饰：使用 'too' 表示程度过高
examples: They aren't too expensive. They cost like £30.、I bought a jacket because the other one that I had was too small.
keywords: too,形容词,可分级形容词,程度修饰,too expensive

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH PREPOSITIONAL PHRASE. CanDo: Can form adjective phrases with a very limited range of adjectives + a prepositional phrase.
chinese_human_name: 形容词短语：形容词+介词短语结构
examples: I think swimming is good for my body.、The house was full of people, my family and friends.
keywords: 形容词短语,介词短语,固定搭配,后置定语,表语

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'TOO' + PREPOSITIONAL PHRASE. CanDo: Can use 'too' + adjective + prepositional phrase
chinese_human_name: 形容词修饰结构：too + 形容词 + 介词短语
examples: I bought them because I noticed that most of my clothes were too small for me.
trigger_lemmas: too small for、too big for、too difficult for、too expensive for
keywords: too,形容词,介词短语,程度表达,for短语

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH DEGREE ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use adverbs of degree ('really', 'so', 'quite') with an increasing range of common gradable adjectives.
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰形容词：really、so、quite的用法
examples: It was sunny and really hot every day!、I'm so happy because we can have a party for my birthday together!、They are quite expensive.
trigger_lemmas: really hot、so happy、quite expensive、really good、so excited
keywords: 程度副词,可分级形容词,really,so,quite,修饰,词序

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: LIMITING ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adjectives ('main', 'only') that limit the noun that they go before.
chinese_human_name: 限定性形容词：main与only的用法
examples: …the main reason is that I am practising the language.、But the only thing that I didn't like was the weather.
keywords: 限定性形容词,main,only,名词修饰,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: PREDICATIVE, WITH 'BE'. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adjectives predicatively, after 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 形容词作表语：与be动词连用的位置
examples: Yes, I am free Monday morning.、I love her because she is friendly.
keywords: 形容词,表语,be动词,句型结构,状态描述

content: Guideword: FORM: PREDICATIVE, WITH LINKING VERBS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of adjectives predicatively, after linking verbs 'look' and 'feel'.
chinese_human_name: 系动词后形容词作表语：look和feel的用法
examples: It is black and it looks perfect.、I bought them because I feel comfortable when I am wearing these clothes.
keywords: 形容词,系动词,表语,look,feel

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: COMPLEX NOUN PHRASES. CanDo: Can form a limited range of complex noun phrases with a superlative adjective  + prepositional phrase, to talk about something unique.► noun phrases ►  clauses: comparison
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词+介词短语：描述独特事物的复杂名词短语
examples: It is the biggest zoo in the world.、They were the happiest days of my life.
trigger_lemmas: in the world、of my life、in the city、of all
keywords: 最高级形容词,介词短语,复杂名词短语,定冠词 the,独特描述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'OF' + NOUN. CanDo: Can use a limited range of prepositional phrases with 'of' after a superlative adjective, to refer to one thing within a set or part of a set.
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词 + 'of' + 名词短语：表示在特定集合中的最佳部分
examples: My teacher said that it was the best project of all.、I learned to surf, this was the best part of the trip.、Hi, Ally. You will miss the best party of the year!
keywords: 最高级形容词,of,名词短语,集合,比较范围

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'IN' + NOUN. CanDo: Can use prepositional phrases with 'in' + singular name of a place after a superlative adjective.
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词与'in' + 地点名词的搭配用法
examples: It's the biggest room in the house.、I bought them because they are the cheapest clothes in the shop.
trigger_lemmas: in the house、in the shop、in the class、in the city
keywords: 最高级形容词,in + 地点名词,比较范围,单数名词,固定句型

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH '-EST'. CanDo: Can form superlative adjectives using the '-est' suffix, with adjectives of one syllable, and with two-syllable adjectives ending in -y.
chinese_human_name: 形容词最高级：使用'-est'后缀的构成方法
examples: The easiest way to get my house is by Underground.、… you are the funniest person that I have ever seen!
trigger_lemmas: the easiest way、the funniest person、the tallest、the happiest
keywords: 最高级,-est后缀,单音节形容词,双音节形容词,the

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'MY' OR 'YOUR'. CanDo: Can form a noun phrase with 'my' or 'your' + superlative adjective + noun, with a limited range of nouns and contexts. ► noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 所有格代词+最高级形容词+名词：my/your + 最高级 + 名词
examples: I bought these clothes for my youngest brother ....、[talking about painting a room] Please wear your oldest clothes.
keywords: 所有格代词,最高级形容词,名词短语,my,your

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH '-EST'. CanDo: Can form superlative adjectives with adjectives of one syllable with a short vowel, by doubling the final consonant and adding '–est'.
chinese_human_name: 单音节形容词最高级：短元音后双写辅音加-est
examples: … it's the biggest and oldest museum in Libya.、It's the biggest room in the house.
trigger_lemmas: the biggest、the hottest、the oldest、in the house
keywords: 最高级,单音节形容词,短元音,双写辅音,the biggest

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'THE'. CanDo: Can form a noun phrase with 'the' + superlative adjective + noun. ► noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词短语：the + 最高级形容词 + 名词
examples: It has the latest technology.、The best place is La Baule, which is Europe's biggest beach.
trigger_lemmas: the best place、the biggest beach、the latest technology
keywords: 最高级形容词,定冠词the,名词短语,比较,固定结构

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH '-ST'. CanDo: Can form superlative adjectives using the suffix '-st' to adjectives ending in '–e'.
chinese_human_name: 形容词最高级：以'-e'结尾的形容词加'-st'构成
examples: I always watch the latest music videos from there.、I like it because it's the largest.、But the nicest thing at my party was my presents.
keywords: 形容词最高级,-st后缀,以-e结尾,定冠词the,比较三个以上事物

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH '-EST'. CanDo: Can form superlative adjectives by adding the suffix '-est', to adjectives of one syllable.
chinese_human_name: 单音节形容词最高级：加后缀'-est'
examples: … it's the biggest and oldest museum in Libya.、It was the cheapest in this shop!
keywords: 最高级,单音节形容词,后缀-est,定冠词the,比较范围

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS, WITH 'THE'. CanDo: Can use 'the' with a limited range of superlative adjectives without a following noun, when the noun is understood.
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词省略名词：与'the'连用的省略结构
examples: My relatives gave me presents but the computer game was the best.、But Mark's present was the most beautiful!
trigger_lemmas: the best、the most beautiful、the worst、the biggest
keywords: 最高级,省略,定冠词the,形容词比较,语境理解

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'THE MOST'. CanDo: Can form superlative adjective phrases using 'the most', with longer adjectives of two or more syllables.
chinese_human_name: 形容词最高级：使用'the most'构成多音节形容词的最高级
examples: We love football competitions because here in Uruguay football is the most popular sport.、It is the most famous place in Edinburgh and it is interesting too.、The problem was that it was the most expensive mobile in the shop.
keywords: 最高级,多音节形容词,the most,比较级,定冠词the
